inline_comments.message:
This change will break Clamp.
You're changing contract between frontend and backend.
This function seems not to be used howether it's used in camel configuration. Please checkout clds-services.xml

Thanks, good point.
My intention was to simplify this logic and don't use the CldsDictionary object all-time in the test, because not always that was necessary. I will refactor the code to don't break this contract and add an additional test to this logic.

Line 89, 90, 94, 95, 96 are for logging purpose, normally it should be present in the main function, to record the starting/ending of the function. So it is more suitable to be put in the function createOrUpdateDictionary(String dictionaryName,                                                                  CldsDictionary cldsDictionary).

Line 92 is for authorization control, and it should be put on the main function as well.

Could you please restructure the 3 createOrUpdateDictionary methods accordingly please?
